scripts.build:android: set NODE_ENV=production&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.test:unit: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-test',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc --outDir .tmp-test --module commonjs --target es2020 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop src/core/utils/date.ts src/core/utils/gamification.ts src/services/gamificationEngine.ts src/services/companionEngine.ts src/services/audioEngine.ts && node --test tests/date.test.cjs tests/gamification.test.cjs tests/companionEngine.test.cjs tests/audioEngine.test.cjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-test',{recursive:true,force:true})"
